Bitmap and bit pattern resources for display drivers, including images and hexadecimal digit patterns.


## Files
- **[dead_face.xbm](dead_face.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for a 69x71 pixel "dead face" image used in the display driver.
- **[empty_bar.xbm](empty_bar.xbm.md)**: Defines a 96x8 pixel empty bar bitmap for display resources.
- **[hex_digits.h](hex_digits.h.md)**: Defines bit patterns for displaying hexadecimal digits on a screen in XBM format.
- **[pebbleos_logo.xbm](pebbleos_logo.xbm.md)**: Bitmap data for the Pebble OS logo with dimensions 112x29 pixels.
